  "findings": [
    "Loud, rhythmic, metallic tapping/clacking noise at idle",
    "Frequency of the tap is at half engine speed, indicating a valvetrain or timing-related issue",
    "Severe slack in the timing chain or a collapsed hydraulic lifter/bucket"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the engine immediately to prevent catastrophic valve-to-piston contact",
    "Remove the valve cover to inspect the timing chain tensioner, guides, and camshaft lobes",
    "Check oil pressure and inspect for collapsed lifters or excessive valve lash"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a highly pronounced, sharp metallic tapping sound synchronized with the valvetrain rotation (half engine speed). This indicates a severe mechanical fault such as a collapsed lifter, excessive valve lash, or a failing timing chain tensioner/guide slapping against the cover. Continued operation risks catastrophic engine failure.",

    "OEM Engine Mechanical Diagnostic Procedures - Noise Diagnosis",
    "Standard Valvetrain and Timing System Inspection Guidelines"
  ]
